problem id: b9e9dc9f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  01011001 -> 01000101
  11111011 -> 10001111
  00010011 -> 00001100
  00101110 -> 00111000
  00011100 -> 01110000
  01110111 -> 00011101
  01110000 -> 11000001
  00001010 -> 00101000
  11110100 -> 01010011

query: 00000000
predicted answer: 00000000
